# AAR / APK Size History

Tracks the SDK's per-ABI footprint across releases. Generated by **③ Release · Ship** (on every published release) and **④ Release · Measure** (manual trigger, or for backfill).

> **Method:** *UI SDK in APK* is measured by an inline probe app whose only dependency is `:amani-sdk-v1`. *Full APK* is the `:app` sample. Sizes are measured in CI on `ubuntu-latest` with JDK 17 (matching `jitpack.yml`) against **release** build variants — debug builds are typically 1.5–3× larger due to retained debug symbols and are intentionally not tracked. The artifact JitPack serves to consumers may differ slightly because JitPack performs its own build.

---

## AAR size trend

At-a-glance view of `:amani-sdk-v1` AAR size across releases — useful for separating SDK-only regressions from APK-level regressions caused by transitive dependency updates.

| Version | AAR | Δ vs prev | Date (UTC) |
